title: [YTP] Poop Hina Opening
description:
Originally posted: January 11, 2008

Old description:
Important: All the clips used in this video are NOT my property, they belong to TV Tokio, Nintendo, Philips etc. I don't take credit for making the clips, I just edited them.

---

Dear children, what do we get when we cross YouTube Poop with Love Hina? POOP HINA! This is the opening I made. If everything goes right I'll even make a few episodes. Enjoy! ^^
Caution, the video contains retarded material. Including Retard Keitaro.
